title: GreenLife 16.5” x 12” Healthy Ceramic Nonstick Roasting Pan with Stainless Steel Roaster Rack, PFAS-Free, PFOA-Free, Dishwasher Safe, Oven Safe, Easy Pouring Rims, Soft Pink
features: Our healthy ceramic nonstick coating is made from sand and free of PFAS, PFOA, lead, and cadmium
Ceramic nonstick creates 60% fewer CO2 emissions during its curing phase than the curing phase for traditional nonstick
Two stainless steel side handles offer total control
Stainless steel roasting rack is dishwasher safe and lets air circulate to promote even heating while lifting food out of liquids in the pan
Dishwasher safe, but most messes wipe away
description: Make oven cooking a little easier with this versatile roaster. Whether making a holiday turkey, a family-sized lasagna, or a huge spread of veggies, this eye-catching turquoise roaster will make oven cooking feel like a day at the beach. Riveted stainless steel handles offer total control for easy oven transfers. Best of all, our healthy ceramic nonstick coating releases even the stickiest foods (hello, cheese) effortlessly and wipes clean in seconds, no soaking required.
